title: Prima 240pc Assorted Safety Pins On Card Chrome, Nickel,Silver, L
features: 🧷 HUGE PACKAGE - 240 count of high-quality safety pins so you will always have some handy!
🧷 FOUR SIZES - 40mm, 30mm, 25mm & 20mm. You will be sure to have the right size available, no matter what you need it for
🧷 HIGH QUALITY - Designed and manufactured with quality and satisfaction in mind, these safety pins are tough, durable and practical.
🧷 ANTI-SNAG NICKEL COATING - Nickel coated for durability and snag-free use.
description: This packet of 240 high quality safety pins has a range of four different sizes, including 40mm, 30mm, 25mm and 20mm. This product comes with each size individually packaged so you can easily select the size you require. Designed in an attractive and traditional nickel-coating, the safety pins are a shiny silver. Owing to their protective coating, these safety pins are rust-resistant and anti-snag. The large selection will mean you have all the safety pins you need for your next project, whether that's sewing, arts and crafts, first aid or a vast array of other potential uses. Dispatched through Amazon, you can be sure of the highest level of service, backed up by Amazon's world-leading customer service. The safety pins in this pack are of professional quality for all of your needs. With free and fast delivery available for Prime members (be sure to check for the Prime badge!), this set assures great value for money, timely delivery and most of all a product that you can trust. Perfect for your every day office or workshop needs, and a low-price promise.
